question: How quickly is customer data deleted after a customer terminates the agreement?

sources.title: Northbeam Data Retention Policy - DRP-02
sources.text: Upon termination of the agreement, customer data is deleted within 30 days.

mock.claim: Customer data is deleted within 30 days of contract termination.
mock.output: Upon termination, Northbeam deletes customer data within 30 days [S1].
